description_long: This is a large, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a matte dark gray finish. The cabinet has a boxy structure with straight, clean lines and is divided into several horizontal sections, each likely representing a separate drawer. The front and sides are segmented by thin, recessed lines, suggesting the presence of multiple drawers stacked vertically. There are no visible handles, label holders, or locks, giving the cabinet a sleek, handle-less appearance. The top is open, indicating it may be a specialized filing or storage unit, possibly for oversized documents or materials. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from metal, suitable for heavy-duty urban or office use.
description: A large, matte dark gray filing cabinet with multiple horizontal drawers and a sleek, handle-less design. The cabinet is robust and boxy, with an open top and clean, modern lines.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full height and width of the cabinet, with six horizontal drawer divisions and no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_1: The left side view mirrors the front, displaying the same segmented drawer structure and open top, emphasizing the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: The back view is nearly identical to the front, with the same horizontal divisions and open top, maintaining the minimalist design.
description_view_3: The right side view matches the left, showing the same drawer segmentation and open top, highlighting the cabinet's symmetrical form.
